argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const type = "{{ type }}" || 'mentions'; const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const capturePattern = '/you/'; const timeout = 8; const DISGUISE_FN = ` function __disguise(fn, name) { const nativeStr = 'function ' + name + '() { [native code] }'; const _origToString = Function.prototype.toString; const _patchedFns = window.__dFns || (function() { const m = new Map(); Object.defineProperty(window, '__dFns', { value: m, enumerable: false, configurable: true }); Object.defineProperty(Function.prototype, 'toString', { value: function() { const override = m.get(this); return override !== undefined ? override : _origToString.call(this); }, writable: true, configurable: true }); return m; })(); _patchedFns.set(fn, nativeStr); try { Object.defineProperty(fn, 'name', { value: name, configurable: true }); } catch {} return fn; }`; let captured = null; let captureResolve; const capturePromise = new Promise(r => { captureResolve = r; }); eval(DISGUISE_FN); const origFetch = window.fetch; window.fetch = __disguise(async function(...fetchArgs) { const resp = await origFetch.apply(this, fetchArgs); try { const url = typeof fetchArgs[0] === 'string' ? fetchArgs[0] : fetchArgs[0] instanceof Request ? fetchArgs[0].url : String(fetchArgs[0]); if (url.includes(capturePattern) && !captured) { try { captured = await resp.clone().json(); captureResolve(); } catch {} } } catch {} return resp; }, 'fetch'); const origXhrOpen = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open; const origXhrSend = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = __disguise(function(method, url) { Object.defineProperty(this, '__iurl', { value: String(url), writable: true, enumerable: false, configurable: true }); return origXhrOpen.apply(this, arguments); }, 'open'); XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send = __disguise(function(body) { if (this.__iurl?.includes(capturePattern) && !captured) { this.addEventListener('load', function() { if (!captured) { try { captured = JSON.parse(this.responseText); captureResolve(); } catch {} } }); } return origXhrSend.apply(this, arguments); }, 'send'); try { const storeName = 'notification'; const actionName = 'getNotification'; const app = document.querySelector('#app'); let store = null; try { const pinia = app?.__vue_app__?.config?.globalProperties?.$pinia; if (pinia?._s) store = pinia._s.get(storeName); } catch {} if (!store) { try { const vuexStore = app?.__vue_app__?.config?.globalProperties?.$store ?? app?.__vue__?.$store; if (vuexStore) { store = { [actionName]: (...a) => vuexStore.dispatch(storeName + '/' + actionName, ...a) }; } } catch {} } if (!store) return { error: 'Store not found: ' + storeName, type, limit }; if (typeof store[actionName] !== 'function') { return { error: 'Action not found: ' + actionName, type, limit }; } await store[actionName](type); if (!captured) { await Promise.race([capturePromise, new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, timeout * 1000))]); } } finally { window.fetch = origFetch; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = origXhrOpen; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send = origXhrSend; } if (!captured) return { error: 'No response captured', type, limit }; const messageList = captured?.data?.message_list ?? []; return { messageList, type, limit }; }

async (intermediate) => { const limit = intermediate.limit || 20; if (intermediate.error) return []; const messageList = intermediate.messageList || []; const notifications = messageList.map(item => ({ user: item?.user_info?.nickname || '', action: item?.title || '', content: (item?.comment_info?.content || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(), note: (item?.item_info?.content || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(), time: item?.time || '' })); return { notifications, limit }; }

async (intermediate) => { const limit = intermediate.limit || 20; const notifications = intermediate.notifications || []; if (!notifications.length) return []; return notifications.slice(0, limit).map((n, i) => ({ rank: i + 1, ...n })); }

variables.name: type
variables.help: Notification type: mentions, likes, or connections
